languages.title: Lugha
languages.subtitle: Chagua lugha inayotumiwa katika programu yote.
languages.noResults: Hakuna lugha zinazolingana na utafutaji wako.

phone.label: Nambari ya simu
phone.searchCountry: Tafuta nchi, msimbo, au kiambishi awali cha kupiga simu
phone.noCountries: Hakuna nchi zinazolingana na utafutaji wako.
phone.countryButton: Badilisha nchi, kwa sasa %{country} pamoja na %{callingCode}
phone.tooShort: Nambari hii ya simu ni fupi sana.
phone.tooLong: Nambari hii ya simu ni ndefu sana.
phone.invalid: Ingiza nambari halali ya simu kwa nchi iliyochaguliwa.
phone.valid: Nambari halali ya simu ya kimataifa

auth.onboardingTagline: Rafiki wa usalama wa kibinafsi kwa wakati kati ya "Niko sawa" na "Ninahitaji msaada."
auth.createSubtitle: Chagua njia ya kuingia ili kulinda grafu yako ya usalama.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Hatukuweza kukamilisha kuingia. Angalia muunganisho wako na ujaribu tena.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kutumia kikao cha maendeleo ya ndani. Kuingia kwa Asili Google hufanya kazi katika ujenzi wa maendeleo.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Oanisha sasa au endelea na uiongeze baadaye.
auth.northStarBody: Inayoweza kuvaliwa VL01 inaweza kusababisha mtiririko wa usalama kwa bomba na ishara ndefu za vyombo vya habari.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Rafiki yako mpole wa usalama kwenye ramani na kwa simu.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear inaweza kusaidia kwa hali ya nyumbani, hali ya mlezi, hali ya dharura, simu za udhuru na usaidizi wa sauti.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Inatumika kwa ramani, maeneo hatari, kuwasili salama, na muktadha SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving inauliza eneo ili walezi waweze kuelewa ni wapi msaada unaweza kuhitajika. Unaweza kubadilisha hii baadaye katika Mipangilio.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Arifa zinasaidia kuingia na matukio ya dharura.
permissions.notificationsBody: Tunatumia arifa tu kwa vidokezo vya usalama, masasisho ya dharura na vikumbusho unavyowezesha.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Mahali huweka muktadha wa usalama sahihi
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving hutumia eneo lako kwa ramani ya usalama, maeneo ya hatari, kushiriki haraka, na muktadha SOS. Unaweza kubadilisha hii baadaye katika Mipangilio.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving hutuma vikumbusho vya kuingia, masasisho ya dharura, na vidokezo vya usalama unavyowezesha. Hatutumii arifa kwa matangazo.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving hutumia maikrofoni yako tu unapoanzisha simu ya AI au ya usalama.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth inaunganisha kifaa chako cha kuvaa
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving hutumia Bluetooth kuoanisha na vito vya NorthStar, kusoma hali ya muunganisho, na kuchochea mtiririko wa usalama kutoka kwa inayoweza kuvaliwa.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving hutumia kamera tu unapochagua kupiga picha ya wasifu au kushiriki picha ya usalama.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving huweka mtiririko huu kutoka kwa Mipangilio na dashibodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Chagua sauti ya mwenzake ambayo inahisi salama zaidi kusikia.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ufuatiliaji wa utulivu kwa usalama wa kila siku.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Bomba tano zinaweza kuongezeka hadi arifa za SOS na mlezi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Unda sababu nzuri ya kuacha hali isiyofaa.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Anza simu ya wakati halisi wakati unahitaji usaidizi.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Jaribu mtiririko wa usalama katika onyesho la shinikizo la chini.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Weka vito vya mapambo karibu wakati wa skanning.
jewelry.noDevices: Hakuna vifaa vya karibu vya NorthStar vilivyopatikana bado.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skanning haikuweza kuanza. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
jewelry.scanFailed: Hatukuweza kupata vito vya karibu. Angalia Bluetooth, weka NorthStar karibu, na ujaribu tena.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skanning haikuweza kuanza. Angalia ufikiaji Bluetooth na ujaribu tena.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ufikiaji wa kifaa cha karibu umezimwa. Ruhusu ufikiaji Bluetooth katika Mipangilio, kisha ujaribu tena.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ilichukua muda mrefu sana kuunganisha. Sogeza karibu na ujaribu tena.
jewelry.connectFailed: Hatukuweza kuungana na NorthStar. Hakikisha kuwa imeshtakiwa na karibu, kisha jaribu tena.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Weka chaji NorthStar na karibu na simu hii, kisha uchanganue tena.

home.subtitle: Dashibodi ya rafiki wa usalama
home.readyBody: Sauti, ramani, vito vya mapambo, na walezi ni bomba moja.

map.title: Ramani ya usalama
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go hakikisho; Mapbox hutoa katika muundo wa maendeleo.
map.updateFailed: Hatukuweza kusasisha eneo lako. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
map.notRequested: Ufikiaji wa eneo haukuombwa. Unaweza kuiwezesha baadaye kutoka kwa Mipangilio.
map.permissionOff: Ufikiaji wa eneo umezimwa. Iwashe katika Mipangilio ili kuweka ramani ya usalama juu yako.
map.timeout: Eneo lako linachukua muda mrefu kuliko ilivyotarajiwa. Sogeza mahali pengine na ishara iliyo wazi na ujaribu tena.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Maeneo yanayoaminika unayohifadhi yataonekana hapa kwa ufikiaji wa haraka.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Kuunganisha kwa usalama kwa mwenzako wa sauti...
safetyCall.useOffline: Tumia mwenzi wa nje ya mtandao
safetyCall.reconnect: Unganisha tena kwenye AI ya sauti
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Anzisha simu au andika ujumbe ukiwa tayari.

history.clearMessage: Hii huondoa ujumbe AI mwenza uliohifadhiwa kutoka kwa kifaa hiki.
history.title: Historia ya mazungumzo
history.subtitle: AI ujumbe shirikishi umehifadhiwa kwenye kifaa hiki.
history.emptyMessage: Mazungumzo yako AI rafiki yataonekana hapa baada ya simu yako ya kwanza.
history.loadFailed: Hatukuweza kupakia historia ya mazungumzo. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
history.clearFailed: Hatukuweza kufuta historia ya mazungumzo. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
history.deleteFailed: Hatukuweza kufuta mazungumzo hayo. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

voices.title: Sauti zangu za simu za usalama
voices.subtitle: Chagua sauti ya mwenzi ambayo inahisi sawa kusikia.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Sampuli hii ya sauti haikuweza kuchezwa. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Tumia majibu rafiki yaliyounganishwa wakati kitambulisho cha mtandao au Hume hakipatikani.
settings.privacyBody: Hamisha au ufute data ya ndani iliyohifadhiwa kwenye kifaa hiki.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Haiwezi kuhamisha data yako sasa hivi.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Hii huondoa wasifu wako, mipangilio, anwani za dharura, historia ya mazungumzo, vikumbusho vya ruhusa na kipindi cha uthibitishaji wa ndani kutoka kwa kifaa hiki.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Haiwezi kufuta data ya ndani hivi sasa.

sections.languageSubtitle: Kiolesura na lugha ya ruhusa ya mfumo
sections.companionSubtitle: Mapendeleo ya sauti na nje ya mtandao
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, walezi, na anwani za dharura
sections.accountSubtitle: Kipindi chako cha sasa cha VeryLoving

settings.updateFailedMessage: Hatukuweza kuokoa upendeleo huo. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Kipindi chako bado kinatumika. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

contacts.title: Anwani za dharura
contacts.subtitle: Watu wanaoaminika wanapatikana wakati wa mtiririko wa usalama.
contacts.name: Jina
contacts.empty: Bado hakuna mawasiliano ya dharura yaliyoongezwa.
contacts.emptyMessage: Ongeza mtu unayemwamini ili awe tayari wakati mtiririko wa usalama unamhitaji.
contacts.removeMessage: Mtu huyu hataonekana tena katika mtiririko wako wa dharura.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Hatukuweza kuhifadhi mawasiliano haya. Angalia maelezo na ujaribu tena.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Hatukuweza kuondoa mawasiliano haya. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

friends.title: Marafiki
friends.subtitle: Walinzi, maombi, na grafu ya dharura.
friends.emptyTitle: Mduara wako wa usalama ni tupu
friends.emptyMessage: Marafiki na walezi wanaoaminika wataonekana hapa mara tu watakapoongezwa.

emergency.title: Dharura SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kuongezeka tu wakati unahitaji msaada wa haraka.
emergency.body: Hii itaarifu mtiririko wako wa usalama na kuandaa anwani za dharura.
emergency.notificationBody: Mtiririko wako wa dharura uko tayari.
emergency.addContact: Ongeza anwani ya dharura katika Mipangilio.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Sehemu ya kushiriki eneo iko tayari. Unganisha sehemu ya mwisho ya kushiriki nyuma ili kutuma viungo vya moja kwa moja.

quickShare.title: Kushiriki haraka
quickShare.subtitle: Mtiririko wa kushiriki eneo uko tayari.

capybearTap.title: Capybear gonga
capybearTap.subtitle: Gusa mara mbili NorthStar yako ili kudondosha chungwa la usalama.
capybearTap.body: Njia ya ishara iko tayari kwa nyaya za tukio la BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Unaonekana nje ya mtandao. Ujumbe wako utatumwa unapounganisha tena.
errors.voiceQueued: Ujumbe umehifadhiwa. Itatumwa wakati mwenzi wa sauti ataungana tena.
errors.voiceConnecting: Kuunganisha kwa usalama kwa mwenzako wa sauti...
errors.microphone: Ufikiaji wa maikrofoni unahitajika kwa simu za sauti. Unaweza kuiwezesha katika Mipangilio, au kuandika ujumbe badala yake.
errors.billing: Mwenzi wa sauti mtandaoni hapatikani kwa muda. Unaweza kuendelea na mwenzi wa nje ya mtandao.
errors.authentication: Mwenzake wa sauti hakuweza kuthibitisha kikao hiki. Ingia tena au utumie mwenzi wa nje ya mtandao kwa sasa.
errors.timeout: Mwenzake wa sauti alichukua muda mrefu sana kujibu. Angalia muunganisho wako na ujaribu tena.
errors.network: Hatukuweza kumfikia mwenzi wa sauti. Angalia muunganisho wako, kisha ujaribu tena au uendelee nje ya mtandao.
errors.genericVoice: Kitu kilikatiza simu ya sauti. Jaribu tena, au endelea na mwenzi wa nje ya mtandao.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving inahitaji ufikiaji wa maikrofoni kwa usalama na simu AI mwenza.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving hutumia eneo lako kwa ramani ya usalama na vipengele vya usalama vilivyo karibu.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving hutumia Bluetooth kuungana na vito vyako vya usalama NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Chaguo hili la kuingia halipatikani katika toleo hili.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Hali ya onyesho hutumia data bandia ya ndani pekee. Huduma zilizounganishwa hazijathibitishwa, na kipindi hiki huwekwa upya programu inapopakiwa upya.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Msimbo wa uthibitishaji si sahihi au muda wake umeisha. Omba msimbo mpya kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Majaribio ya kuingia ni mengi sana. Subiri kidogo, kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Uthibitishaji wa kuingia ulichukua muda mrefu sana. Angalia muunganisho wako kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Hatukuweza kufikia huduma ya kuingia. Angalia muunganisho wako kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Ramani ya usalama haikuweza kupakiwa. Angalia muunganisho wako kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Mahali ulipo sasa hapapatikani. Inaonyesha mahali pako pa mwisho palipohifadhiwa kutoka %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Hatukuweza kushiriki mahali ulipo. Angalia ruhusa ya kufikia mahali ulipo kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Hapa ndipo mahali pangu pa mwisho palipohifadhiwa na kurekodiwa saa %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ufikiaji wa Bluetooth umezimwa. Uwashe katika Mipangilio, kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth imezimwa. Iwashe, kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Uoanishaji wa Bluetooth haupatikani kwenye kifaa au toleo hili.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Hatukuweza kupata NorthStar. Iweke karibu, angalia Bluetooth, kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Hakuna vifaa vya NorthStar vilivyopatikana karibu. Iweke karibu kisha uchanganue tena.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Hatukuweza kuunganisha kwenye NorthStar. Hakikisha ina chaji na iko karibu, kisha ujaribu tena.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Hatukuweza kuhifadhi mahali hapa. Jaribu tena.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Hakuna mtu wa mawasiliano ya dharura aliyepatikana; hakuna simu iliyopigwa.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Kipiga simu hakikuweza kufunguka; hakuna simu iliyopigwa.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Jaribio la mwisho la SOS halikuweza kuthibitishwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Msaidizi wa sauti hapatikani kwa sasa. Jaribu tena baadaye au uendelee na msaidizi wa nje ya mtandao.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Hariri mtu wa mawasiliano ya dharura
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Mtu wa mawasiliano ya dharura amesasishwa.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
